Fufaan yeroo gabaa bahu qarshii dhibba qaba ture; yeroo manatti galu garuu…. Deebii Gilgaala 6. A. Caasaan isaan barreessan sirrii ta’uu hubadhu. Barreeffama isaanii caasicha hordofuun akka siif ibsan gaafadhu. B. Madda amanamaafi sirrii ta’e argachuun barreessuu isaanii mirkaneessi. Madda odeeffannoo isaanii gaafadhu. C. Barreeffama kana irraa funaanii sirreessif. Barreeffama

kanaaf, qabxii laachuun madaalliif itti fayyadamuu dandeessa. 50 Qajeelcha Barsiisaa Kutaa 10 4. Gaaffiiwwan Keessa Deebii Barattoonni barnoota boqonnaa kana keessatti baratan akka sirriitti hubatan gaaffiiwwan waliigalaa keessa deebii armaan gadii hojjechiisi. Gaaffiiwwan armaan gadiif deebii gaggabaabaa kenni. 1. Muudannoo Burqaafi Dureettiirraa maal hubatte? 2. Barreeffama kalaqaafi barreeffama dhugaa maaltu adda taasisa? 3. Dandeettiin asoosama barreessuu uumamaan argama moo barnootaan gabbata? 4. Barreeffama keessatti tajaajila sarara xiqqaafi sarara dheeraa adda baasii barreessi. Fakkeenya himoota lamaan isaanii keessatti tajaajilaman afur barreessi. 5. Garaagarummaa hennaa murannaafi murannaalaa ibsi. Hennaawwan kanneen lamaaniin himoota shan barreessi. 5. Madaallii Dhuma boqannichaarratti, barattoonni danddeettiiwwan armaan gadii gonfachuu isaanii mirkaneeffadhu. • Barreeffama dhihaateef, saffisaan, sakattaafi suuta dubbisuun dhaamsa addaddaa barreeffamicha keessaa hubachuu • Jechoota dubbisa keessaa bahaniif

hiika galumsaa laachuu danda’uu, • Tajaajila sarara dheeraa,sarara xiqqaafi, fuftuu hubachuun himoota isaanii keessatti itti fayyadamuu danda’uu • Seenaa hidda dhalootaa isaanii caaseffamaafi, barreeffamaan barreessuu danda’uu • Hennaawwan murannaafi muraannalaa tajaajila isaanii hubachuun himoota isaanii keessatti itti fayyadamuu danda’uu. 51 Boqonnaa 6: Onesmoos Nasiib Boqonnaa 6: Onesmoos Nasiib (Wayitii 9) Seensa Boqonnichaa Boqonnaa kana keessatti barattoonni mata-duree, “Onesmoos Nasiib” jedhu dubbisuun seenaa jireenya Onesmoos Nasiibfi jaalala guddaa uummata isaaf qaburraa ka’uun gumaacha inni guddina Afaan Oromoof godhe akka hubatanii dinqisiifatan isaan taasisa. Gama biraatiin, ogummaa barreeffama isaanii dhiyaate akkaataa addaddaatiin dubbisuun dhaamsa gaaffiiwwan gosoota addaaddaa deebisuu shaakalu. Dabalataanis, ogummaa jechootaaf hiika galumsaa laachuu cimsatu. Caaslugaan walqabatee ammoo, garaagartii sirna tuqaalee mallattoo waraabbii dachaa ( “ ” )fi mallattoo waraabbii qeenxee

( ‘ ’) hubachuun himoota keessatti sirriitti akka itti fayyadaman; akkasumas, maqaafi gosoota maqaa adda baasuun akka hubatan isaan gargaara. Dhumarrattis geerarsaafi seenaa namootaa barreessuu akka shaakalan isaan jajjabeessa. 1. Kaayyoo: Barnoota boqonnaa kanaatiin booda barattoonni: • namoota guddina Afaan Oromoof gumaacha godhan/bu’aa qabatamaa buusan himu. • saffisaan dubbisuun yaadawwan ijoo/gurguddaa adda baasuun himu. • sakattaan dubbisanii qabxiiwwan gooree adda baasu. • hiika galumsa jechootaa himu. • seenaa namoota Afaan Oromoo guddisuuf carraaqanii barreessu. • sirna tuqaalee mallattoo waraabbii dachaa ( “ ” )fi mallattoo waraabbii qeenxee ( ‘ ’) himoota keessatti sirriitti itti fayyadamu. • maqaafi gosoota maqaa adda baasanii himu. • geerarsa barreessuun ergaa inni dabarsu ibsu. 2. kaan nicaala,” jechuun warri morman jiru. 4. Ogeeyyiin fayyaa ‘bargarii’ baayyisanii nyaachuun wanta nama furdisuuf of eeggannoo gochuun barbaachisaa akka ta’e gorsu. 5. Barattoonni seenaa kana barreessuun dura, namoonni guddina afaan Oromoof gumaacha guddaa taasisan eenyufaa akka ta’an dareetti irratti mari’achuun adda baasisi. Madaallii Dhuma boqannichaarratti, barattoonni ogummaawwan armaan gadii goonfachuu isaanii mirkaneeffadhu. • Barreeffama dhihaateef, saffisaan, sakattaafi suuta dubbisuun dhaamsa addaddaa barreeffamicha keessaa hubachuu , • Jechoota dubbifama keessaa bahaniif hiika galumsaa laachuu danda’uu, • Tajaajila sirna tuqaalee warabbii dachaafi

waraabbii qeenxee hubachuun himoota isaanii keessatti itti fayyadamuu danda’uu, • Maqaafi gosoota isaa adda baasanii hubachuun himoota isaanii keessatti sirriitti itti fayyadamuu, • Seenaa namoota Afaan Oromoo guddisuuf gumaacha godhanii barreessuu • Afoola keessaa geerarsa barreessanii yeedaloo isaa eeguun geeraruu. 57 Boqonnaa 7: Faayidaa Bosonaafi Bineensotaa Boqonnaa 7: Faayidaa Bosonaafi Bineensotaa (Wayitii 7) Seensa Boqonnichaa Boqonnaa kana keessatti barattoonni, dubbisa “Faayidaa Qabeenya Bosonaafi Bineensotaa” jedhu dubbisuun, bosonniifi bineensonni bosonaa jiruufi jireenya ilma namaaf hagam barbaachisaa akka ta’an hubatu. Kuni ammoo bosonaafi qabeenya bosona keessa jiru kunuunsuu keessatti gahee isaanii akka gumaachan isaan danddeessisa. Shaakaloonni boqonnaa kana keessatti laataman dandeettii afaanii addaaddaa akka cimsatan isaan taasisa. Kutaa caaslugaa boqonnaa kanaa keessatti, maqaan akka maqibsaatti akka tajaajilu hubachuun haaluma sanaan itti fayyadamuu

danda’u. Shaakala dandeettii barreessuu keessatti ammoo garaagarummaafi tokkummaa wantootni qaban agarsiisuuf wantoota walbira qabanii barreessuu shaakalu. Dhumarrattis, mata-duree isaaniif laattamerratti, yaada dhiyaateef deeggaruun ykn mormuun afaaninis ta’ee barreeffamaan mormii dhiheessu. 1. Mala Baruu-Barsiisuu Barannoo 1: Dhaggeeffachuufi Dubbachuu Gilgaala 1: Shaakala Dhaggeeffachuun Duraa Deebii gilgaala 1A Gaaffiiwwan gilgaala kana jalattti dhiyaatan barattoonni osoo gara 70 Qajeelcha Barsiisaa Kutaa 10 dhaggeeffachuutti hince’iin dura gareen akka irratti mari’atanu yaadamee kan qophaa’ani. Atis barattoonni gareen gaaffiiwwan dhiyaatan irratti akka mariyaatanu godhi. Deebii barattoonni kennanu hunda keessumsiisi. Kaayyoon gilgaala kanaas deebii murtaa’e tokko argachuuf kan qophaa’ee miti. Deebii gilgaala 1B Gara dhaggeeffachuutti barattoonni osoo hince’iin dura hiika jechoota dhiyaatanii akka tilmaamanu godhi. Tilmaammii jara hunda keessumsiisi. Fakkeenyaaf jecha ‘maalummaa’ jedhu barattoonni ‘eenyummaa’, ‘sabummaa’ fi kkf jedhanii hiikuu nidanda’u. Gilgaala 2: Shaakala Yeroo Dhaggeeffachuu Barreeffama waa’ee aadaa

irratti qophaa’eef ati dubbistuuf dhaggeeffachaa barattoonni gaaffiiwwan gilgaala kana jala jiranu akka deebisan godhi. Barreeffamichas al lama yookaan al sadii dubbisiif. Waan ati xiyyeeffachuun sirraa eegamu tokko yoo jiraate dubbisuu osoo hineegaliin dura barattoonni gaaffiiwwan kana jalqaba akka dubbisanii yaada jaraa argatan godhi. Deebii gilgaala 2A 1. amalaafi yaada baratamaa 2. amantaa, seera amalaa, afaan, aartii teeknooloojii, haala oomishaafi qophii nyaataa, amantaa, sirna siyaasaafi diinagdee 3. aadaa 4. Tokkoffaan, aadaan mallattoolee qabatamaarratti hundaa’a. Kunis mallattooleefi qooqa fayyadamuun waliigaluu ofkeessatti hammata. Lammaffaan, aadaan kan waliiniiti. Ummanni hawaasa tokko amalootaafi karaa itti yaadu waliin hirmaata. Sadaffaan, aadaan nibaratama. Kana jechuun namni tokko aadaa kan baratu namoota hawaasa sana keessa jiran irraatti. 5. walqixa 6. guddinaafi dagaagina 71 Boqonnaa 9: Sirna Gadaa Aadaa

Aadaan amalaafi yaada baratamaa ummanni garee hawaasummaa tokko keessa jiru baratu, uumuufi bocu. Aadaan, garee hawaasaa tokko kan biraarraa adda kan goduudha. Aadaan ummata tokkoo amantaa, seera amalaa, afaan, aartii, teeknooloojii, haala uffannaa, haala oomishaafi qophii nyaataa, sirna siyaasaafi diinagdee dabalata. Qorannaan aadaa irratti godhaman hedduun jaraa akka ibsanutti, aadaan jireenya garee hawaasaa tokko keessatti iddoo guddaa akka qabu agarsiisa. Hawaasni tokko maalummaa isaa kan calaqqisiisu aadaa isaatiin. Aadaan hawaasa tokkoof akka mallattoo eenyummaatti gargaara jechuudha. Hawaasni kamiyyuu aadaa uffannaa, aadaa nyaataa, aadaa sirbaa, aadaa cidhaa, aadaa jireenyaafi kan kana fakkaatanu hedduu qabaachuu nidanda’a. Kana malees, aadaan amaloota adda isa godhan baay’ee qaba. Tokkoffaan, aadaan mallattoolee qabatamaarratti hunda’a. Kunis mallattooleefi qooqa fayyadamuun waliigaluu ofkeessatti hammata. Lammaffaan, aadaan kan waliiniiti. Sadaffaan,

aadaan nibaratama. Kana jechuun namni tokko aadaa kan baratu namoota hawaasa sana keessa jiran irraati. Aadaan gara gara. Ummanni kamiyyuu aadaa mataa isaa qaba. Ogeessonni aadaa dhimma kana hubachuun, hawaasni adda addaa aadaa walii akka hubatan jajjababeessu. Haaluma kanaan, namoonni hedduun aadaan kamiyyuu kan biraarraa adda ta’uu isaa hubachuun aadaawwan hunda walqixa kabaju. Aadaan tokko guutumaa guutuutti kan beeku nama aadicha keessatti dhalatee, jiraateefi hirmaate qofa ta’ullee, namoonni biraa aadaa sana kabajuufi fedhuun nibaratu. Walumaagalatti, aadaan maalummaafi jireenya hawaasa tokkoo calaqqisiirurra darbee guddinaafi dagaagina hawaasa sanaaf faayidaa hedduu qaba. Barbaachisummaan aadaa ofii beekuufi kabajuuf gonkumaa shakkii hinqabu. Mee nutis, hangam aadaa ummata keessa jiraachaa jirru akka beeknu of haagaafannu. 72 Qajeelcha Barsiisaa Kutaa 10 Deebii gilgaala 2B Gaaffiiwwan gilgaala kana

jalatti dhiyaatan keessaa kan yaada sirrii hintaane ‘soba’ kan sirrii ta’e ammoo ‘dhugaa’ jechuun sababa jaraa wajjin akka barreessan godhi. Sababni jarri kennanus barreeffama ati dubbisteef keessaa ta’uu akka qabu akeekkachiisi. 1. Soba 2. Soba 3. Dhugaa 4. addaa agarsiisanu barreessi. Hima barreessite fuuldurattis gosa ibsa gochimaa kam akka ta’es barreessi. 5. Madaallii Boqonnaa kana keessatti madaallii adda addaa raawwachuutu sirraa eegama. Barreeffama dhaggeeffachuuf dhiyaate sirriitti barattoonni hubachuu jaraa mirkaneeffadhu. Gaaffiiwwan dhaggeeffachuu duraa sirriitti deebisuu yoo baatan dubbisicha al lama yookaan al sadii irra deddeebi’uun dubbisiif. Dubbisa mataduree “Sirna Gadaa” irratti dhiyaate saffisaan dubbisanii odeeffannoo waliigalaa baasanii barreessuu jaraa mirkaneeffadhu. Kana malees, dubbisa dhiyaate suuta dubbisuun gaaffilee hubannoo barreeffamaan deebisuu isaanii qulqulleeffadhu. Jechoota dubbisa keessaa ba’an hiika jaraa sirriitti hubtanii filachuu jaraa ilaali. Lafa jarri hubachuuf rakkatanirratti haala jechichi dubbisa keessatti dhiyaate agarsiisuun gargaariin.Kana malees seerluga Afaan Oromoo keessaa caasaa himaa addaan baasanii himuu jaraa mirkaneeffadhu. Gosoota walqabsiisota addaan baasuun hima keessatti fayyadamuu danda’uu jaraas hubadhu. Shaakala dabalataa

adda addaa kennuun bakka jarri hubachuuf rakkatan irratti gargaarsa addaa godhiif. Ibsa gochimaafi gosoota isaa hima keessaa galchuun hubachuu danda’uu jaraa mirkaneeffadhu. 77 Boqonnaa 10: Guddifachaa Boqonnaa 10: Guddifachaa (Wayitii 7 ) Dheerina wayitii tokkoo daqiiqaa 40 Seensa Boqonnichaa Boqonnaa kana keessatti barattoonni aadaa Oromoo keessaa guddifachaan maal akka ta’e hubatu. Jechootaafis hiika sirrii kennuu danda’u. Dabalatanis, keeyyata keessaa hima ijoo, himoota callaafi hima goolabaa addaan baasuun barreesssu. ogummaa barreeffama barattootaa kan cimsan shakalliin hedduu boqonnaa kana keessattis hammatamanii jiru. Haaluma kanaan, barattoonni gumee qopheessanii keeyyata akka barreessan godhamu. Kana malees, barattoonni hubannoofi dandeettii sirna tuqalee fayyadamuu irratti qaban nicimsatu. 1. Kaayyoo: Barattoonni barnoota boqonnaa kanaatiin booda: • Aadaa Oromoo keessatti guddifachaan maal akka ta’e dubbisa dubbisuun hubatu. • Jechootaaf

hiika sirrii kennu. • Keeyyata keessatti himoota calla, hima ijoofi hima goolabaa addaan baasuun hubatu. • Gumee qopheessuun keeyyata barreessu. • Ittifayyadama sirna tuqaalee irratti hubannoo gabbifatu. 2. Qabiyyee • ogummaa dubbisuufi dubbachuu • Jechootaaf hiika sirrii kennuu • Keeyyata keessaa himoota calla, hima ijoofi hima goolabaa addaan baasuu • Gumee qopheessuun keeyyata barreessu • Sirna tuqaalee 3. Mala Baruu-Barsiisuu Barannoo 1: Dubbisuufi Dubbachuu Gilgaala 1: Shaakala Dubbisuun Duraa Deebii gilgaala 1A Gaaffiiwwan gilgaala kana jalatti dhiyaatan gareen akka irratti mari’atanu godhi. Kaayyoon gilgaala kaanas barattoonni osoo dubbisa dhiyaatetti hince’iin dura 78 Qajeelcha Barsiisaa Kutaa 10 dhimmoota yaada dubbisa dhiyaatee wajjin walqabanu irratti mari’achuun hubannoo jaraa akka gabbifatanuuf. Kanaafuu, gilgaalli kun deebii murtaa’aa ta’e tokko hinqabu. Deebii gilgaala 1B Hiika

jechoota gilgaala kana jalatti dhiyaatan osoo gara dubbisaatti hinseeniin akka barattoonni tilmaamanu godhi. barreeffama ati dubbisteef keessaa ta’uu akka qabu akeekkachiisi. Sababa jaraas dubbisa dhiyaate keessaa akka argatanu hubachiisiin. 1. Dhugaa 2. Soba 3. Soba 4. Dhugaa 5. Haaluma kanaan, barattoonni gaaffiiwwan gilgaala kana jalatti dhiyaatan sodaa tokko malee akka deebisan jajjabeessiin. Baratoonni hiika jechoota kanaa haala galumsa jaraatiin akka kennanu godhi. Dabalataanis, hiika galumsa jaraa kan ifa godhu hima akka ijaaranu taasisi. Deebii gilgaala 4B 1. B 2. D

3. C 4. B 5. A Deebii gilgaala 5 1. Kaayyoon Tolaa waan sadii: barnoota, beekamummaafi mana ijaaruu. 2. Haati koo waan afur bittee dhufte: dabtara, qalama, kopheefi uffata. 3. Keeyyanni tokko hima ijoo tokko qofa irraa ijaarama. Kana malees, keeyyanni tokko himoota callaa tokkoo ol qaba. Keeyyanni gilgaala kana jalatti dhiyaate hima ijoo tokkoofi himoota callaa tokkoo ol qaba. Hima jioo: Sirni Gadaa bu’uura dimookiraasiifi sirna siyaasaa ummata Oromoo ta’ee hojjeta. Gadaa sirna dimokiraasiiti jechuun nidanda’ama Himoota callaa: Hima ijoofi hima goolabaa ala kan jiranu hundi hima callaa jalatti ramadamu Deebii gilgaala 6B Matadureewwan gilgaala kana jalatti kennaman keessaa tokko filachuun akka keeyyata barreessan godhi. Keeyyata barreessan keessaa hima ijoo, himoota callaafi hima goolabaa addaan baasuun akka barreessanus haata’u. 80 Qajeelcha Barsiisaa Kutaa 10 Gilgaala 7: Shaakala Gumeefi Barreeffama Qopheessuu Gilgaala kana osoo hineegaliin dura fakkeenya kenname siirriitti hubachuu jaraa addaan baafadhu. Fakkeenyi kenname barattoonni gumee akkam godhanii akka qopheessanuuf gumee qophaa’e bu’uureeffachuun akkam godhanii barreeffama akka qopheessan kan mul’isu. Matadureewwan kennaman keessaa tokko filachuun jalqaba gumee akka qopheessanu godhi. Itti aansuun gumee qopheessan irratti barreeffama akka qopheessan taasisiin. Gumeefi barreeffama jaraas gareen irratti akka mari’atanu haata’u. 4. Gaaffiiwwan keessa deebii

1. Mataduree «Guddifachaa » jedhu irratti keeyyata tokko barreessi. Keeyyata barreessite keessaas hima ijoo, himoota callaafi hima goolabaa addaan baasuun agarsiisi. 2. Madaallii Boqonnaa kana keessatti dubbisa mataduree “Guddifachaa” jalatti dhiyaate dubbisanii barattoonni yaada isaa hubachuu jaraa mirkaneeffadhu. Kana malees, guddifachaan aadaa Oromoo keessaatti bakka inni qabu sirriitti addaan baasanii hubachuu jaraa mirkaneeffadhu. Hiika jechootaa haala galumsa jaraan addaan baasanii kennuu danda’uu jaraa qulqulleeffadhu. Keeyyata dhiyaate keessaa hima ijoo, himoota callaafi hima goolabaa sirriitti addaan baasuu jaraa mirkaneeffadhu. Garaagarumma jaraas sirriitti himuu danda’uu jaraa hubadhu. Matadureewwan dhiyaatan irratti gumee

qopheessanii keeyyata ijaaruu jaraa addaan baafadhu. Keeyyata ijaaran keessaa hima ijoo, himoota callaafi hima goolabaa addaan baasanii agarsiisuu jaraa mirkaneeffadhu. Sirna tuqaalee hima keessatti sirriitti fayyadamuu jaraa addaan baafadhu. Keessumaa sarara xiqqaafi tuq-lamee sirriitti hima keessatti gargaaramuu danda’uu jaraa mirkaneeffadhu. 81 Boqonnaa 11: Kunuuna Qabeenya Uumamaa Boqonnaa 11: Kunuunsa Qabeenya Uumamaa (Wayitii 7) Dheerina wayitii tokkoo daqiiqaa 40 Seensa Boqonnichaa Boqonnaa kana keessatti barattoonni dubbisa waa’ee “Kunuunsa Qabeenya Uumamaa” jalatti dhiyaate dubbisuun yaada isaa hubatu. Yaada dubbisichaafi muxannoo jaraa walqabsiisuun kunuunsa qabeenya uumamaa keessatti iddoo jaraa hubatu. Hiika jechootaa himaan walsimsiisuun hima hiika guutuu qabu ijaaru. Kana malees, faayidaa durduubeefi hubannoo mammaaksaa gabbifatu. Dabalataanis, himaafi gosoota himaa addaan baasanii hubatu. 1. Kaayyoo: Barattoonni, barnoota boqonnaa kanaatiin booda: • Ergaa dubbisa

mataduree “Kunuunsa Qabeenyaa Uumamaa” jalatti dhiyaate hubatu. • Hiika jechootaa himaan walsimsiisuu danda’u. • Durduubee hima keessatti itti tajaajilamu. • Himaafi gosoota himaa hubatu. • Hubannoo mammaaksaa gabbifatu. 2. Qabiyyee • Dubbisuufi dubbachuu • Hiika jechootaa himaan walsimsiisuu • Faayidaa durduubee • Himaafi gosoota himaa • Mammaaksa 3. Mala Baruu-Barsiisuu Barannoo 1: Dubbisuufi Dubbachuu Gilgaala 1: Shaakala Dubbisuun Duraa Gaaffiiwwan gilgaala kana jalatti dhiyaatan qaama shaakala dhaggeeffachuu duraati. 82 Qajeelcha Barsiisaa Kutaa 10 Kanaafuu, barattoonni gareen ta’uun akka gaaffiiwwan dhiyaatan irratti mariyatan taasisi. Itti aansuun yaada jaraa afaaniin akka dareef dhiyeessan godhi. Kaayyoon gilgaala kanaaa barattoonni dubbisa wa’ee kunuunsa qabeenyaa osoo hin dubbisiin dura kaka’umsa akka uumanuuf yaadameetu. Jechoonni barreeffama keessaa ba’anis gilgaala kana jalatti dhiyaatanii jiru. Hiika jaraas osoo

gara dubbisichaatti hinseeniin akka barattoonni tilmaamanu godhi. Fakkeenyaa: Wantoota: dhimmoota Barbaaduu: fedhuu Gilgaala 2: Shaakala Yeroo Dubbisuu Deebii gilgaala 2A Gara dubbisaatti osoo hince’iin dura barattoonni akka gaaffiiwwan gilgaala kana jalatti dhiyaatan dubbisuun qalbeeffatan godhi. Itti aansuun dubbisa dhiyaate saffisaan dubbisuun gaaffiiwwan dhiyaatan akaka deebisanu taasisi. 1. Qabeenya uumamaa jechuun lafa irra jiraannuufi wantoota lafa irra jiran hunda jechuudha. 2. Kana jechuun akka jarri hinbarbadoofne godhanii fayyadamuun dhaloota dhufuuf dabarsuu jechuudha. 3. Jijjiirama qilleensa, gammoojummaa, lolaa, bubbeefi kkf. 4. Jijjiirama hubannoofi beekumsa akka ummanni fidu gochuuf carraaquu barbaachisa. Deebii gilgaala 2B Gaaffiiwwan gilgaala kana jalatti dhiyaatan keessaa kan yaada sirrii hintaane ‘soba’ kan sirrii ta’e ammoo ‘dhugaa’ jechuun sababa jaraa wajjin akka barreessan godhi. Sababni jarri kennanus barreeffama keessaa ta’uu

akka qabu hubachiisi. 83 Boqonnaa 11: Kunuuna Qabeenya Uumamaa 1. Soba 2. Soba 3. Soba 4. Dhugaa 5. Dhugaa Deebii gilgaala 2C Jechoonni gilgaala kana jalatti dhiyaatan dubbisa waa’ee kunuunsa qabeenyaa uumamaa keessaa kan ba’an. Hiika jechootaa haala galumsa jaraan akka himaa wajjin walsimsiiisanu godhi. 1. qabeenya 2. dhaloota 3. kunuunsa 4. gadadoo 5. barbadeessuun Gilgaala 3: Shaakala Dubbisuun Boodaa Kaayyoon gilgaala kanaa gaaffiiwwan dhiyaataniif deebii murtaa’aa argachuuf miti. Barattoonni dubbisa waa’ee kunuunsa qabeenya uumamaa keessaa hubannoo maalii akka argataniif hubannoo argatan kana hangam muuxannoo jaraa wajjin walsimsiisuu danda’aniiru isa jedhu sakatta’uuf. Deebiiwwan barattoonni kennanu hangam faayidaa kunuunsa qabeenya uumamaa hubachuun hojiirraa oolchuuf akka kaka’an sitti agarsiisuu nidanda’a. Barannoo 2: Caasluga Shaakala Faayidaa Durduubee Deebii gilgaala 4 Yaadannoo waa’ee faayidaa

durduubee kitaaba barataa keessatti kenname akka dubbisanii hubatan godhi. Itti aansuun durduubee gilgaala kana jalatti kennaman irratti akka hima ijaaranu taasisi. Hima ijaaranis akka dareef dubbisanu godhi. Gilgaala kanaaf deebii adda addaa argachuu nidandeessa. Atis barattoonni hima ijaaran keessatti durduubee sirriitti fayyadamuu danda’uu jaraa hordofi. 84 Qajeelcha Barsiisaa Kutaa 10 Deebii gilgaala 5A Jechoota gilgaala kana jalatti dhiyaatan irratti akka himoota fudhatama qabanu akka ijaaranu godhi. Deebiin gilgaala kanaa garaa gara ta’uu nidanda’a. Kanaafuu qabxiin madallii deebii barattootaa: 1. Hiika jechoota kennamanii sirriitti hubachuu 2. Himi ijaarame fudhatama qabaachuu isaa Haaluma kanaan, deebii barattootaa sirrummaa isaa ilaaluu nidandeessa. Barattoonnis himoota ijaaran afaaniin dareef akka dhiyeessanu taasisi. Deebii gilgaala 5B Gilgaalli kun barattoonni gosa himaa sirritti hubatanii addaan baasuu danda’uu jaraa

kan ittiin hubattu. Yaadannoo kitaaba jaraa keessatti kennameef osoo gara gilgaala kanaatti hince’iin akka dubbisanii hubatanu haata’u. 1. Hima raajeffanno 2. Hima ajajaa 3. Hima gaaffii 4. Hima himaamsa 5. Hima himaamsa 6. Hima gaaffii 7. Hima ajajaa 8. Hima raajeffannoo Deebii gilgaala 5C Mataduree kana jalatti yaadannoo waa’ee himaafi gosoota himaa ilaachisee kitaaba barataa keessatti kennameera. Barattoonni yaadannoo kenname kana dubbisuun akka hubatanu taasisi. Itti aansuun caasluga Afaan Oromoo keessatti himi akkamiin akka ijaaramu itti argasiisi. Kana malees, garaagarummaa hima yaada hir’uu, hima fudhatama hinqabneefi hima qindaa’ina hinqabne itti agarsiisi. Barattoonnis akka afaaniin hima yaada hir’uu, hima fudhatama hinqabneefi hima qindaa’ina hinqabne fakkeenya kennan gargaariin. Jalqaba barattoonni gabatee gilgaala kana jalatti dhiyaate akka dabtara jararratti garagalchanu taasisi. Itti aansuun

[9] ‘Faayidaa (hikmaa) fi fedhii (maqsuud) jedhuun bakka buufamutti jecha ‘hiika’ jedhu fayyadamaa ture. Yaad-rimeen ‘ Tiyoorii kaayyolee’ jedhu seera walii gala kan bulchiinsa Islaamaa seera qabeessaa fi ragaalee isa gargaaruuf tartiiba kennuu fi kallattii tokkoo fi hiika wal-fakkaatu kennu ibsa. Tiyooriin kaayyolee tiyoorii haqaa, tiyoorii ulaagaalee haqaa fi seera/bulchiinsa murtaawaa of keessatti hammata. Sagalee fi argannoon fudhatamaan tiyoorii kaayyolee seerri Rabbii ogummaa, gara laafina, haqaa fi wal-qixxummaa irratti hundaa’e jedhanii amanuu irratti hundaa’e. Hiikni qo’annaan hordoffii gadi fagoo seera Islaamaa irratti adeemsifame tiyoorii kaayyolee ol-aanaa ibsa. Bu’uura kana irratti hundaa’uun tiyooriin kaayyolee bal’ina seera Islaamaa hooggana; hubannoo hundaa fi hiika of-danda’aaf akeeka kenna. Adeemsa kana keessatti qabxiin adda ba’iinsaa beekamtummaa hin malle, kan seerri faayidaa argamsiisuu fi miidhaa hambisuuf

har’aa fi borus fayyaduudha. Tiyooriin kaayyolee iskeelii faayidaa Islaamummaa keessatti qabuu ibsa. Kunis wantoota jiraachuuf dirqama nama barbaachisan (al-Daruuriyyaa), wantoota barbaachisoo garuu isa malees jiraachuun danda’amu (al-Haajiyyaat) fi kan jireenyi guutuu fi bareechuuf barbaachisan (takmiiliyyaa) faadha. Ilaalcha kaayyolee gurguddaa al-Shaaxibii duraatti jiran Barruun kaayyolee Islaamaa irratti al-Shaaxibiin duratti barreeffaman tiyoorii kaayyolee shari’aatiif seensa seenaa ta’anii tajaajilaa turan. Barruuleen kun kaayyolee seera Islaamaa argachuuf, barbaachisummaa isaanii walii galaa hubachuuf, [10] hundee fi madden tiyoorii isaa ibsuuf tarkaanfii al-Shaaxibii dura fudhatametu jira. Dirreen umamaa, kan kaayyoleen seera Islaamaa irratti xiyyeeffatufiqhii Islaamaa fi bu’uurra isaa (usuul al-fiqhi) dha. Wanti kaayyolee kanaa ilaallatu hojii fuqahaa (beektota murtee sheri’aa Islaamaa bal’inaan beekan) fi usuuliyyoota (beektota seerota bu’uura Fiqhii) tiin ragaan itti godhamee jira. al- Shaaxibiin

hojii garee lameenii kan kaayyoo irratti xiyyeeffatee, kan akka Usuuliyyootaa fi mana barumsa Maalikii irratti hundaa’e. Tiyooriin al-Shaaxibii Kan fiqhiidhaan wal-qabatu, irra hedduun isaa mana barumsa Maalikii fi kaayyolee seera Islaamaa isaaniitiin daangeffama. Sababa fuqahaan xiyyeeffannoo guddaa kaayyolee seera Islaamaatiif kennaniif usuuliyyoonni xiyyeeffannoo isaaniif Kennan. Al-Juhaynii fi al-Gazaaliin saaphuphee (qindoomina) xiinxaltoota warra Usuul al-Fiqhii qo’atanii keessatti hidhata mul’ataa qabu. Kunis mata duree al-maqaasid qabiyyee isaa muraas ibsuudhaani. Usuuliyyoonni barruu jaraa keessatti hiikaa fi tiyoorii duraa fudhatan. Usuulli aadaa hidhata hiika bifa ifa ta’ee fi dhaala wal-qabataa ta’een al-Gazaalii irra dhufeen wal qabsiisu. Jaarraa sadaffaa keessa falaasamni suufiyyaa kan al-Hakiim al-Tirmizii jedhamu kaayyoo seera Islaamaa, seera Islaamaa bu’uuraa fi beekumsa (Hikmaa) dhokataa irratti xiyyeeffate. Tirmiziin sababa kaa’uun hundee dirqama amantii Islaamaa

adda baase. Beektonni usuula fiqhii duraanii aqiidaa fi qo’annaa fiqhii wajjiin wal-qabsiisu. Hayyoonni Usuula fiqhii armaan gadii warra kaayyolee seera Islaamaa irratti xiyyeeffataniidha: al-Juwaynii [11] (478H du’e) kitaaba al-Burhaan (mirkaneessa) jedhamu barreesse. Jalqaba nama usuul al-fiqhii irratti barreessee fi nama guddaa hordoftoota isaa irratti jijjiirama fideedha. Kan biraa immoo Imaam Abuu Haamid al-Gazaaliidha. Hirmaannaan guddaan al-Juhayniin kaayyoo seera Islaamaa irratti godhe: qabxii barbaachisaa, kan lubbuu qulqulluu eegu, wantoota walii galatti barbaachisan kanneen wantoota baay’ee barbaachisan jalatti hin ramadamne; kanneen mallattoo kabajaa barbaaduu fi faallaa isaanii dhiisuu wajjiin wal-qabatan; kan akka mallatoo qulqullummaa, warra hojii filatamaa ykn gaarii jajjabeessuuf barbaachisan daangessanii fi warra ibsa ykn kaayyoo ifaa dhabaniidha. Al-Juwayniin kaayyoo abbaa amantii wantoota jireenyaaf barbaachisan, wantoota barbaachisoo ta’an garuu kan isaan

ala jiraachuun danda’amuuu fi wantoota jiruu guutuu fi tolchuuf barbaachisan, qoodama isa bu’uura ibsa Maqaasidaa hunda ta’uu wajjiin wal-qabsiise. Jalqaba wantoota seera Islaamaa keessatti baay’ee barbaachisaa ta’an shan dura lafa kaa’e jira. isaanis: Amantii, lubbuu, sammuu, sanyii fi qabeenya. Imaam al-Gazaaliin (505 H du’e) usuul al-fiqhii fi kaayyolee seera Islaamaa keessatti warra hangafa irraayi. Inni kun karaa ittiin Ta’liil, ykn hiika seera Islaamaa bu’uura (ilal) isaa lafa kaa’uutiin argate. Ammas fedhii seera Islaamaa keessatti ‘…kaayyoo abbaa seeraa/amantii eeguu.’ jedhamun beekame ibse. Al-Gazaaliin kaayyolee jiddu galeessa seera Islaamaa kan niyyaa fi fedhiin hundi irra naanna’u ibse. Kan amantii ykn kan addunyaa jechuudhaan qoode. Dubbii isaas Akkana jechuudhaan goolabe: “Dahoon akka fedhe hojii saalfachiisaa ta’us wanti [12] wantoota amantiidhaan wal-qabatan hunda walitti

hammate, akkasumas fedhii addunyaatiin wal-qabate” yoo fedhii addunyaa caala fedhii amantii irratti xiyyeeffate al-Gazaaliin ‘Amantii tiksuu’ keessaa kaayyolee seeraa akkaan barbaachisoo ta’an tarree duraa irratti ramade. Al-Juwaynii hordofuudhaan al-Gazaaliin fedhiiwwan seera Islaamaatiin tikfaman barbaachisummaa fi ifaa ta’uu isaa irratti hundaa’uun wantoota jireenyaaf barbaachisan (al-daruuriyyaat), wantoota barbaachisoo ta’an garuu kan isaan ala jiraachuun danda’amuu (al-Haajiyyaat) fi wantoota jiruu guutuuf barbaachisan (al-Tahsiiniyyaat) jechuun bakka sadiitti qoode. Usuuliyyoota warra isa boodaatiif hanga yeroo imaam al- Shaaxibiitti ulaagaalee kaa’e. Imaam al-Shaaxibiin guddina seenaa usuul al- fiqhii keessatti abbaa dabaree sadaffaati. Al-Gazaaliin beektota jaarraa 13ffaa fi 14ffaa jijjiiruu danda’ee ture. Jaarraan kunis jaarraa eektonni akka: Fakr al-ddiin al-Raazii, Sayf al-diin al-Haamidii, ibni al-Haajib, al-Baydaawii, al-Isnaawwii, Ibni al-Subkii, Izzaddiin bin Abdussalaamii fi Ibni Taymiyaa fa’a keessa

jiraataa turaniidha. Beektonni kun seera al-Gazaalii hiikaa fi ibsa hawaasummaa keessatti itti fayyadaman. Ibni Taymiyaan kaayyolee seera Islaamaa barbaachisoo shanan usuliyyootaaitti ni amanu. seera kan akkaan guddaa jedhu ykn faayidaa addaa/akkaan barbaachisaa jedhutti hin amanan. Kaayyolee mana barnoota Maalikii beekuun bu’uura tiyoorii al- Shaaxibii hubachuudhaaf nu fayyada. Manni barnoota Maalikii kan al-Shaaxibii jijjiire, kaayyolee seera Islaamaa irratti xiyyeeffachuudhaan fiqii Islaamaa kan warra kaanii irraa adda [13] ta’a. al-Shaaxibiin yaanni isaa booda keessa (yeroon booda) mana barnoota fiqhii Islaamaa biraatti babal’ate keessaa isa tokko. Imaam Maalik bin Anas mana barumsichaa akka guutuu fi seera bilchaataatti dhaalan. Maalik akka hordofaa mana barnootaa Sanaa kan yaadicha waahillan ergamaa Rabbi (SAW) (1)irraa bifa oduu fi shaakalaatiin dhaalanitti of ilaalu. Maalik hiika of- danda’aa fi

murtii kennan. Beekumsa beektota Madiinaa akka caasaa isaatti fudhatan. Fiqhii mana barumsa Madiinaa keessatti argameef, Umar bin al- Kaxxaab fakkeenya duraati. Manni barnoota Maalikii Umaritti hirkifame. Garuu hiikaa fi murtii inni Islaamummaaf kennuu ol- maddisiise. Mallatoo/hundeen isaa raga kitaaba Maalikii al- Muwaxxa’ jedhamuu fi fiqhii isaanii, bulmaata seeraa, fatwaa/murtii isaanii fi aadaa erga Sunnaa ergamaa Rabbiitiin booda hundeeffame keessa jira. Adeemsi ummata Madiinaa sunnaa nabiyyii, adeemsa bakka buutota qaqqajeeloo afraniinii fi bara Umar hundeeffame irratti hundaa’e. Umar jalqaba seera ‘Fedhii hin daangefamne/al-masaalih al-mursalah’ jedhuu fi ‘Waan badaatti karaa cufuu/saddu al-Zarii’ah’ jedhu akka tiyooriittis ta’ee qabatama/shaakalaanis lafa qabsiise. Ibni Taymiyaan mana barumsa Maalikii caalaa, seera qabeessaa fi fudhatamaadha jedhanii moggaasan. Namni seera Islaamaa fi ulaagaa isaa qorate seera bu’uuraa kan maalikiitu

sirrii tahuu arga jedhan. “Jiraattota Madiinaatu ulaagaa fi seera hunda keessatti (1) SAW jechuun jecha Afaan Arabaa-Salla Alaahu Alayhi wasallam jedhu irraa kan gabaabsame ennaa ta’u hiikni isaas nageenyaa fi tolli Rabbii isaan irra haa jiraatu jechuudha. Innis kan jedhamu ennaa maqaan nabiyyii dubbatame booda. [14] fudhatamaadha.” Islaamummaan magaalaa Madiinaa iddoo inni itti tasgabbii fi bilchina itti argate, akkasumas iddoo hojiin bakka buutota qaqqajeeloo afraniin bu’uureffame fakkeenya wahyii ta’e keessatti guutuutti gadi dhaabbate. Islaamummaan kutaa gara garaa bakka beektonni Islaamaa dhaalmaya (hambaa) warra Madiinaa fudhatanitti babal’ate. Kan armaan gadii wantoota bu’uuraa baay’ee barbaachistoota ta’an kallattiidhaan kaayyolee Islaamaatiin wal-qabatan kan Maalikiin irra turani. Hojiin qabiyyee faayidaa ykn fedhii (al- Maslahaa) irratti hundaa’anii waan tokko murteessuu seera Islaamaa keessatti yeroo waahillan ergamaa

Rabbii (SAW) – keessattuu yeroo Umar madde. Al-Gazaaliin akkana jedhe: “Yeroo gara Qiyaasaa dhufnu, sahaabonni fakkeenya hawaasa Muslimaaati. Kunis waan inni murteessee fi shakkii jarri fedhii irratti hundaa’an jedhuun wal- qabsiisuudhaani.”. Al-Gazaaliin fedhii/faayidaa namaa akka madda ragaa irratti hunda’amee seerri Islaamaa ka’amuu godhanii hojiitti hiikuu ni fudhata. Sababni isaas waan gochi kun sahaabotaan hojii irra ooleefi jedha. Faayidaan ilaalamu faayidaa abbaan seeraa (abbaan amantii) ilaaleen kan wal-fakkaatu ta’uu akka ulaagaatti lafa kaa’e. Dhimmi guddaan faayidaan namaa fi kaayyoon abbaan amantii wal-simachuudha. Kaayyoleen abbaa amantii akka armaan gadiitti cuunfamee ka’amuu ni danda’a: ‘Faayidaa (namaaf) argamsiisuu fi miidhaa hambisuudha’. Hidhanni kun seera Islaamaa hunda keessa jira. Keessattuu seera aadaa fi hojii guyyaa guyyaa keessatti. [15] Ulaagaaleen fiqhii hiika of danda’aa qabu kamillee

Istihsaan (waan hojjaatamu tokko gaariidha jedhanii yaaduu) irratti hundaa’uu qaba. Barruu jiru hubachuu fi cuunfaan barruulee sana irraa fudhatamu ulaaga kaayyoleen barruu Sanaa faayidaa argamsiisuu fi miidhaa deebisuu jedhu irratti hundaa’uu qaba. Kana jechuun yeroo barruu kamillee hubachuu barbaadan, ykn garaa garummaa jidduu seera lamaanii ilaalan faayidaa ilma namaa ilaalcha keessa galchuudha. Wanti seera bu’uuraa Maalikii adda taasisu, yaada “fedhii hin daangeffamne” jedhu hojii irra oolchuudha. Manni barumsaa kun fedhii fi faayidaa ilma namaatiif xiyyeeffannoo kennuu isaa keessatti baay’ee ifaadha. Fedhii fi faayidaan kun kaayyolee fi fedhii seera Islaamaa hunda keessatti hojii irra oola. Akkasumas kaayyoleen addaa ykn fedhiin tokko tokkoon seera bulmaataa kana keessa jiru-seera aadaa fi hojii guyyaa guyyaa keessatti hojiitti hiikamuu qaba. Dhugaa dubbachuuf, abbaan seeraa wantoota

akka faayidaa bu’uuraatti tajaajilan hin dhowwu. Karaan faayidaa irratti hundaa’e aadaa Maalikiyyootaa keessatti hundee seenaa qaba. Tiyooriin Istihsaanaa seera Islaamaa keessatti guutummaan guutuutti dagaage. Yaadichi hojii nabi Muhammad keessatti dura mul’ate; sana booda yeroowahyiin (beeksisni) samii dhaabbannaan barbaachisummaan isaa guddatu ifaaf ifatti babal’ate. Babal’innii fi shaakalli kun kan argame yeroo bakka buutota qaqqajeeltota afranii ture. Keessattuu yeroo barsiisaa fi fakkeenyummaa Umar bin al-Kaxxaab. Maalik istihsaana hiika qeenxee, fi ifaan ifatti faayidaa/fedhii ilma namaa ilaalcha keessa galchuu godhee hojiitti hiike. [16] Abuu Haniifaan karaa seera Islaamaa isa fedhii irratti hundaa’ee ni argatan, hiika seeraa, bulciinsa isaa fi yaada Istihsaanaa keessatti ibsan. Hanafiyyoonni hiika qeenxee ifa ta’e tokko irratti waliif hin galle. Yaad-rimeen istihsaanaa jara biratti damee tiyoorii fedhii/faayidaa ilama namaa kan

seera Islaamaa keessa jiruutiti. Yoo Ilaalcha Maalikii keessatti istihsaanni sagal-kurnaffaa (9/10) hiika of-danda’aa fiqhii ta’ee fi hiikni Isthisaanaa fedhii dhala namaa fi haqa ilaalcha keessa galchuu ta’e fuqahaa’onnii (beektonni seera Islaamaa) kaayyoo abbaa amantii, isa fedhii dhala namaa fi haqa mirkaneessuu ta’e sana hin dhabu. Akkasumas yoo miidhaa hojjatame barbaade istihsaanni hiika of danda’aa fi fatwaa miidhaa sana dhaabsisuuf oolu barbaada. Hiikni istihsaanaa Maalikii biratti fedhii dhala namaa mirkaneessuu, miidhaa deebisuu fi bakka seerri kitaabaa ifaan hin jirretti qajeelfama fedhii dhala namaa eegu jabeessuu jechuudha. Ilaalcha kana keessatti hariiroon jidduu abbaa amantii fi fedhii ilma namaa jiru ifa. Hiikni akkasii kun hariiroo jidduu seera idilee fi fedhii ilma namaa kan jarri tiksuuf hojjatan ibsa. Kunis yeroo kitaabni kaayyolee fi sababa

isaa irratti hundaa’uun hubatameedha. Manni barumsa Maalikii fi kanneen biroos saddu al-zaraa’i (waan hamaa deebisuu) jedhu ni fudhatu. Tooftaan/malli kun kallattii biraa, kan abbaan amantii faayidaa ilma namaa argamsiisuu fi miidhaa ykn malaammaltummaa deebisuun fedhii ilma namaa guutu keessaa isa tokko. Barreessitoonni ammayyaas mata duree kana hojii usuul-al-fiqhii keessatti ilaalan. Innis Ka’umsa isa abbaan amantii hubannoo seeraa kan hundeesse [17] kaayyoo faayidaa dhala namaatiif mirkaneessuu; miidhaa fi malaa maltummaa eeguufi jedhu irratti hundaa’uuni. Yeroo seerri seera duraan tumame irraa faayidaa garaa garaa argamsiisuuf ykn waan faallaa kaayyoo isaa kan dhugaatti gahuuf barruu duraanii fayyadamu seerri jaraa hin mirkaneessu. Maalikiin dameewwan fiqhii hedduu keessati heera bu’uuraa kan sad al-zarii’a jedhu fayyadaman. Kunis booda al-Shaaxibiidhaan mirkaneeffame. Ergaan kun malaa maltummaa fi jecha

nabiyyiin abbootiin aangoo akka kennaa hin fudhanne dhowwan keessatti hojiitti hiikama. Maalikiyyoonni (warri mazhaba Maalik hordofan) garee qulqulluu eeguuf jecha waa’ee fiqhii daldalaa, adabbii fi sirna gaa’ilaa irratti xiyyeeffatu. Ilaalchi mana barnoota Maalikii kan fedhiidhaan wal-qabte kan biroo immoo bittaa fi gurgurtaa, adabbii fi sirna gaa’ilaa ilaalchisee heera “qabxii wal- dhabbii ilaalcha keessa galchuu” dha. Waa’ee adabbii seeraa irratti, manni barnoota Maalikii mana barnoota fiqihii keessaa kan hunda caalaa jabaa fi nama tokkoon yakkamaadha jechuu deebisuuf karaa dheeraa deemu; karaa roorroo fi malaamaltummaa hunda cufu. Yaada kanatti dabuun kun fiqhii, siyaasaa fi seera bulmaata Umar keessatti hidda godhate. Manni barnoota Maalikii kaayyoo ilma namaa ilaaluu fi seera isa irratti hundeessuudhaan mana barnoota duraa ta’an. Al- Shaaxibiin hariiroo jidduu kaayyoo ilma

namaa fi kaayyoo abbaa seeraa jidduu jiru ifa godhe. Mata dureen biraa kan maalikiyyoonni bifa walitti fufiinsa qabuun seera kaayyolee fi fedhiiwwanii hojiitti hiikuuf hojjatan, waa’ee kakuu fi dirqama isaatiin wal-qabata. Dhimma kana irratti gaheen niyyaan (hamileen) qabu akka gaa’ilaa fi himannaa [18] yakkaatti ilaalan. Kunis dubbii gubbaa isaatiin fudhachuu osoo hin ta’in, kaayyolee fi fedhiiwwan hojii fi jecha namaa booda jiru ilaalcha keessa galchuudhaani. Dabalataanis manni barnoota Maalikii seera dhokataa fi fedhii malaamaltummaa dhowwuu irratti xiyyeeffannoo addaa kenne. Al-Shaaxibii fi tiyoorii isaa Seenaan Abuu Is-haaq al-Shaaxibii akkana jechuudhaan isa ibsa: “Beekaa kabajamaa, imaama hubataa, fakkeenya, nama Qur’aana haffazee fi nama of danda’ee seera Islaamaa fi maddeen isaa hiikuudhaaf gahumsa qabuudha…” al-Shaaxibiin Giraanaadaa keessatti guddate. Shaykota Giraanaadaa fi warra iddoo

biraatiin ilaalchi isaa jijjiirame. Hojii al-Shaaxibii keessaa kan hunda caala barbaachisaan “al-Muwaffaqaat” kan jedhamu bara 1302H/1184CE maxxanfame. Kitaabichi kaayyolee Islaamaa gurguddaa fi bulchiinsa isaan wal-qabatan, ragaalee idilee qooduu, hojii ummataa hogganuuf raga fayyadamuu, ijtihaadaafi murtii dhimma wal-dhabbiin wal-qabatu irratti fuulleffata. Al- Shaaxibiin mata duree bida’aa jedhuu fi muhdasaa jedhu dhiheesse. Bida’aa fi Muhdasaa jechuun hojii Qur’aanaa fi hadiisa, ykn jechaa fi gocha nabiyyii keessa waanhin jirre hojjachuudha. Seerota fiqhii bu’a qabeessa akka faayidaa hin daangeffamnee fi waan gaariitti fudhatamu (istihsaana) dhiheessuuf hundee tooftaa usuul al-fiqhii keessa jiru fayyadame. Ulaagaalee fiqhii fi kaayolee seeraa hubachuu wajjiin, al-Shaaxibiin seerota/ulaagaalee fiqhii hojiitti hiikuu qo’ate. Al-Shaaxibiin barreessaa xiinxala fagoo fi beekaa dursee qo’annaa yeroo [19] dheeraa adeemsisee fi waan barreesse irratti nama mariyachiiseedha. Al-Shaaxibiin

qabiyyee walii galaa kan gorsaan wal-qabatu, hojii salaata dursuu ykn imaamummaa, mataa ofii kallattii kanaan beekumsaa fi dhugaa qabuun hoogganuu kan jedhu irratti fuulleffate. Fatwaa isaa keessatti inni sunnaa deebise, aadaa fi amantii yeroo nabiyyii fi sahaabota isaanii hin jirre, garuu kan yeroo al-Shaaxibii jiru ni faallesse. Warroonni al-Shaaxibii qeeqan, shakkii fi soba isa irratti uumu. Garuu inni shakkii isaatiif dhugaa ta’ee hafe. Haala kana keessatti himannaan isa irratti kaafame. Al-Shaaxibiin kitaaba al-I’tisaam jedhamu barreesse. Kitaabichi kun kitaabbota waa’ee dur-hin jirree (waan amantii keessatti haaromsame) ilaalchisee barreeffame keessaa hunda caala barbaachisaadha jedhamee ilaalama. Al-Shaaxibiin sheekkota hedduu warra gaaffilee ulfaataa ta’anii dhiheessan wajjiin waliif galee jira. Akkasumas yaada wal- jijjiirraa fi marii barbaachisaa yeroo sana mana barnoota Maalikii keessa ture irratti

hirmaate. Gaaffileen irratti xiyyeeffataman kun fedhii fi amala yeroo sammuu isaa ibsa. Dhimmoota asii gadii muraasa dhiheesse. Beektonni fiqhii warri mana barnoota Maalikii, dhimmoota kamuu irratti yaanni wal-faallaan hedduun jiraachuu danda’a jedhanii amanu. Hundinuu imaam Maalikitti hirkifama. Dhuguma jechi wal-dhabaan hedduun argamuu danda’a; garuu wal-faallessuun jidduu jaraa jiraachuu wajjiin fatwaa jaraa hunda isaanii irratti hundeessu. Beektonni usuul al-fiqhi iyeroo dhimma amantii tokko irratti jechi wal-dhabbiin dhihaate, kamtu kamiin [20] dursa jechuunis yoo hin beekamne akka ragaa seeraatti hin fudhatamu jedhu. Waan Maalik jedhe ilaalchisee yoo mana barnoota Maalikii keessa yaanni wal-hin simanne jiraate namni tokko “Kun ejjannoo warri mana barnoota Maalikii dhimma kana irratti qabaniidha” jechuu danda’a. Kunis yeroo jecha isaa kanaan nama yaada kana deeggarutu jira jechuu itti yaade

qofa sirrii ta’uu danda’a. Beektonni fiqhii yeroo hunda jechoota al- Mudawwanaah Maalikii keessa jiru, ykn bakkuma fedhe jiraatee kan hubannoo jaraa irratti hundaa’ee murteeffame ilaalu. Maalikii fi manni barnoota isaa “Yaada wal-faallaadhaaf iddoo kennuu” dhaan baay’ee beekamu. Ulaagaalee fatwaan Maalikiyyootaa gariin iratti hundaa’eedha. Erga akkana ta’ee seerri wal-dhabbii ejjannoo mana barnoota Maalikii ogganu, garuu ejjannoo mana barnoota ykn beektota warra birootiin wal- simatu fatwaan beektota fiqhii Maalikiitiin kennamu, erga murtiin kennamee ykn erga gochi raawwatamee murtichi dhugaa ta’uu fi yaada mana barumsa faallaa isaa wajjiin fudhatamaa ta’uu danda’a. Al-Gazaalii, ibni Rushdii fi warri biraas gosa falamii yaada faallaa kan shubahaa (waan murtiin isaa wal-fakkaatu) sodaachuutti fudhatan. Dhimmoonni eeyyamamaa ta’uu fi ta’uu dhabuun hin beekamne, wanta wal-namatti fakkaatu (shubhaa) dha jedhanii

amanu. wanti akkanaa aadaa nabiyyii keessatti itti hin kakaafamu. Akka seera Islaamaatti garuu dhimmi wal- fakkaataan kun ilaalacha addaa qaba. Yeroo hojii namoonni hordofan wanta seera keessatti barreeffameen, waan warri gaggaariin, beektonnii fi warra [21] ijtihaada godhaniin faallaa ta’uu agarre, gocha amma raawwatamaa jiruu fooyyessuu, seeraa fi fakkeenya warra nu duraa faallessuu qabanaa? Yoo akkana ta’e akkamitti sunnaan jijjiirama qabaatee itti fufa? Gaaffiiwwan Al-Shaaxibiin ka’an kun ragaa idilee fi hundee fiqhiitiif amanamummaa inni qabu dhiiba. Akka sodaan Rabbii ibsutti wal-dhabbii hambisuuf, al-Shaaxibiin seera barbaachisaa fi fudhatamaa baase. Seerichis kan akkana jedhu: “Seera tokko hojii irra oolchuun yoo akka ilaalcha walii galaatti faallaa seeraa fi sababaa ta’e, akka seera guutuutti fudhatamaa fi wal-simataatti hin ilaalamu. Akkasumas haal-duree malee hojiitti hin hiikamu.”

Ijoon qo’annoo kanaa, tiyooriimaqaasida al-Shaaxibiiti. Qo’annaa seera kan taatee/sababa irratti hundaa’e, kan adeemsise keessatti al-Shaaxibiin “Seerri Rabbiin biraa buufame hundi ilma namaa tiksuufi…” jedha. Seerri kan hundeeffameef fedhii dhala namaa eeguufi; hiikni taatee irratti hundaa’e kun bal’ina seeraa hunda ilaalchisee adeemsifamaa jira jechuudhaan goolabe. Al-Shaaxibiin kaayyolee seeraa ol-aanoo lamatti qoode. Isaanis: kaayyolee ol’aanoo abbaa seeraa fi kaayyolee ol’aanoo warra seera biratti ilaalcha qabniiti. Dabalataanis kaayyolee abbaa seeraa gosa afuritti qoode. Isaanis: kaayyolee ol’aanoo abbaa seeraa seera hundeessuu keessatti, kaayyolee ol’aanoo hubannoo ummataa hundeessuu keessatti, kaayyolee ol’aanoo akka madaala oogganuutti hundeessuu fi kaayyolee ol’aanoo dhala namaa murtii seeraa jala fiduudha. Al-Shaaxibiin kaayyolee abbaa seeraa kan seera hundeessuu keessa jiru gosa sadi’iin ibse. Isaanis: faayidaa dhala namaa kan amantii fi addunyyaa argamsiisuuf

barbabaachisaa ta’uu, dirqama [22] ykn barbabaachisummaa fedhii ykn kaayyoleedhaan wal- qabatan, miidhagina kan wanta barbaachisaa fi dirqamaa argamsiisuu fi guutuuf oolu hojjatu. Kaayyoleen baay’ee barbaachisoon: amantii, lubbuu namaa, sanyii namaa, qabeenya namaa fi sammuu namaa of-keessatti hammata jedhe. seerri Islaamaa kan karaa godhameef, fedhiiwwan baay’ee barbaachisoo fi kanneen biroo seeraan tiksuu, argama jaraa guddisuu fi dhabama irraa jara eeguufi. Fedhiiwwan barbaachistoonni shanan fedhiiwwan biroo hundaaf akka bu’uuraatti ilaalamu. Fedhiiwwan seeraan eegaman kun tokko kan biraa balleessuuf hojiitti hiikamuu hin qabu. Akkasumas kan irra barbaachisaa ta’e kan xiqqoo barbaachisaadhaan haqamuu hin qabu. Tokko kan biraa jabeessuu, guutuu fi eeguudhaaf hundeeffaman. Kana labsuun booda “Kaayyoleen barbaachistoonni dirqamaa fi bareedinaaf bu’uura.” Al-Shaxibiin kan armaan gadii lafa kaa’e: - Wantoonni baay’ee barbaachistoonni wantoota dirqamaa

fi bareedinaatiif bu’uura. - Wal-duraa duubni Wantoota baay’ee barbaachistootaa baduun wal-duraa duubni kan lamaan boodaa baduutti geessa. - Wantoonni dirqamaa fi bareedinaa wal-madaalu dhabuun tartiibni wantoota barbaachisoo wal-madaaluu dhabuu hin kennu. - Wantoonni bareedinaa ykn dirqamaa guutumaan guutuutti wal-madaaluu dhabuun, wantoonni barbaachistoonni hanga tokko wal-madaaluu dhabuutti [23] geessuu danda’a. Wantoonni miidhaginaa fi dirqamaa wantoota barbaachistootaaf qusatamuu qabu. Al-Shaaxibiin kaayyolee ol’aanoo abbaan amantii gadi fageenyaan hubachuudhaaf seera hundeesse bal’inaan ibse. Seera hundeessuu akka madaala oggansaatti ilaaluu ilaa'lchisee al- Shaaxibiin kaayyolee abbaa seeraa gaaffilee seera duratti deebii qaban, abbaan seeraa maal-hojjata, maal dhiisa? Isa jedhu addaan baase. Fkn kan akkana jedhu cuunfee kaa’e: “Yoo kaayyoon abbaa seeraa waan nurraa barbaade sanaan rakkinaa fi ulfaatina kaasuu ta’e, kaayoon isaa nuti gaarii hojjachuu fi

dirqama keenya ba’achuu mirkaneessuudha.” Akka al-Shaaxibiin jedhetti Islaamummaa keessatti seerri “Karaa akkaan madaalawaa ta’ee fi tarkaanfii moggaa lamaanii jidduu…” ta’ee buufame. Dirqamoota seeraan barbaadaman irra hedduu, kan akka salaataa, soomaa fi zakaa, akkasumas dhowwamiinsa wantoota dhowwamanii irra hedduun, hundinuu irra hedduun isaa madaala ilma namaatiin wal-simatu ta’uu agarra. Yeroo waa’ee kaayyolee ol’aantuu murtii abbaan seeraa keessa jiru ibsu al-Shaaxibiin akkana jedhe: “Ilma namaatiin wal- qabatee seerri Islaamaa kan hunda of-keessatti hammatee fi hunda wal-gahaadha.”. “waan baranne hunda; kan dhimma addunyaas ta’ee kan sanaan alaa gara aangoo seeraatti deebisuu qabna.”. inni kaayyoolee abbaa seeraa cubbuu/jallina fedhii addunyaa irraa gara aangoo seeraa fi bulchiinsa isaatti baasuufi jechuudhaan ibse. Akkasumas yeroo kaayyoolee seeraa ijibbaata godhu al- Shaaxibiin kaayyoolee dhala namaa tuqee jira. Kunis

dursee [24] hubachuu isaa fi dhimmicha keessatti mijjee/gahumsa qabaachuu isaa kan ibsu keessaa isa tokko. Dhugaa amantii kan “Hojiin niyyaa/kaayyoo irraa addaan hin bahu; yeroo amala tokko irratti murteessan kaayyoleen ilaalcha keessa galfamuu qaba” jedhu raggaasise. Dabalataanis “Kaayyoon abbaan seeraa namaaf qabu seera kaa’uu keessatti fedhii isaatiin kan wal-galu gochuudhaaf maal godhuu qaba isa jedhu yaaduudha.” Akka al-Shaaxibiin goolabetti “…ammayyuu goolabbii marii kaayyolee kanaa ifa godhuuf oolu, kan itti yadame fi waan Rabbiin itti fedhe sirriitti hiikuu nu barbaachisa.” “waan abbaan seeraa yaadee fi kan inni hin yaanne namni tokko akkamitti adda baasa?” jedhee gaafate. Kaayyolee abbaa seeraa beekuudhaaf bu’uura afur kaa’e. Jalqaba ajajaa fi dhowwaa mul’ataa, ajajaa fi dhowwaadhaaf bu’uura isaa ilaalcha keessa galchuu, kaayyolee lammaffaa ilaalcha keessa galchuu

(kaayyolee duraa tajaajiluu keessatti) fi abbaan seeraa haala labsaa fi seera baasuu barbachisetti cal’isuudha. Akka tiyooriin kaayyolee al-Shaaxibii dhiheessutti irra hedduun barruu isaa ibsutti bakki namni tokko ‘kaayyoon isaa’ argatu tiyoorii isaa ifaa fi hubatamaa godha. Al-Shaaxibiin jalqaba maqaasid al-Sharii’aa fi waan isa hordofee dhufu irratti xiyyeeffate. Mormii isaa jabaa ejjannoo bu’uurri fiqhii seera walii galaa irratti ijaarame isa jedhu irratti. “Hawaasni Muslimaa seerri Islaamaa wantoota barbaachistoota ta’an eeguu irratti hundeefame jechuu irratti waliif galu. Isaanis: amantii, lubbuu, sanyii, qabeenyaa fi sammuu namaati.” Kaayyoleen ol’aanoon seeraa fi ulaagaan isaa aqiidaa Islaamaa wajjiin Qur’aana Makkaati buufame wajjiin jirti. Akka al- [25] Shaaxibiin wantoota barbaachistoota ykn wantoota walii galaa shanan hordofetti ragaaleen jara deeggaran Qur’aana Makkaa keessa jiru. Amantii Islaamaa tiksuu fi

sirreessuun, sirreessuu fi jabeessuun Qur’aana Makkaa keessa jiru dhimma beekamaa fi ifaa, kan ragaa fi fakkeenya isa deeggaru tarreessuun hin barbaachisneedha. Al-Shaaxibiin seera/ulaagaa seeraa kan Qur’aana Makkaa fi kan walii galaa dhiheesse. Al-Shaaxibiin hariiroo jidduu ragaalee shari’aa hedduu – Qur’aana, Sunnaa dabalatee fi jidduu dameewwan seeraa gara garaa kan walii galaa fi kan addaa walitti hidhuuf ilaalcha isaa kan “Kaayyoo irratti hundaa’e” fayyadame. Akka inni ilaaletti, Qur’aanni Makkaa yaada/ibsa walii galaa irratti kan xiyyeeffate yeroo ta’u, kan Madiinaa immoo ibsa bal’inaa irratti xiyyeeffata. Sunnaan guutumatti Qur’aana irratti hundaa’e jedha. Sunnaan hiika walii gala Qur’aana keessaa, kan tokkollee Qur’aanaan wal- hin dhabne irratti hundoofnee fakkeenya kam hordofuu akka qabnu nuuf ibsa. Al-Shaaxibiin yaada kaayyolee fi qoodama seeraa gara gosoota barbaachistoota, ajajnii

fi dhowwaan seera Islaamaa keessa jiru sadarkaa tokkoo fi barbaachisummaa wal-qixa hin qabu jedhu deeggaruuf itti fayyadame. Amantoonnii fi manni barnootaa wal- duraa duubaa fi sadarkaa ajajaa fi dhorkaa seera keessa jiru itti yaaduu qabu. Mata dureewwan usuula al-fiqhii irratti barreeffaman hedduun waa’ee seera bulmaataa irratti xiyyeeffata. Keessattuu akka lakkoofsa Hijraatti jaarra 5ffaa irraa eegalee waan kana irratti xiyyeeffate. Ibsi hojii ‘Mahbuub/jaalatamaa’, ykn ‘eeyyamamaa’ jedhuu hojiiwwan bulchiinsaan wal-qabataniidha. Warroonni [26] usuulaa irra hedduun jaraa dhimma qoodinsaan wal-qabatan dhiheessan. Al-Shaaxibiin dhimma kana kallattii “Tiyooriikaayyolee” tiin ilaale. Garaa garummaan inni jidduu gochaa fi hojjachuu dhabuu seensise ilaalcha walii galaa fi kan addaa, fedhiiwwanii fi kaayyolee irratti hundaa’e. Hariiroon jidduu sababa, bu’aa fi kaayyoo jiru; sababnii fi dhugaan nama dhuunfaa fi fedhii hawaasaa

wajjiin wal-qabata. Al-Shaaxibiin ulaagaalee fi seera ilaalcha kaayyolee irratti hundaa’een wal-qabatu lafa kaa’e. Fkn abbaan seeraa, sababa murteessuu keessatti, akkuma kaayyoo qaban bu’aa qabu. Ilmi namaa sababa qofaaf gaafatama malee bu’aa jaraatiif miti. Rabbit itti gaafatama bu’aa fi sabba wal-qabatiinsa jidduu jaraatii fi sababa jaraa jiruu fudhate. Al-Shaaxibiin barruu namni dhuunfaa bu’aa isa ilaallachuu qaba jedhuu fi yeroo sababa hojjatu sana ilaalcha keessa galchuu qaba jedhu akkana jechuudhaan dhiheesse: “…namni tokko bu’aa hojii isa boodaatiif xiinxala/xiyyeeffannoo kenne wanti kun osoo hojii sana hin hojjatin irraa dhaabbachuuf isa gargaaruu mala.”wanti fedhii namaa fi kaayyoo Rabbii eegu, fedhamuu fi yaadamuu qaba. Wanti jara miidhu kan fedhe haa ta’uu eegamuu fi didamuu qaba. Tiyoorii al-Shaaxibii keessatti dhimmoota bu’uura ta’an Yeroo tiyoorii kaayyolee bu’uuraa

irratti xiyyeeffannu, al- Shaaxibiin seerri guutummaa isaa keessatti sababaa hordofa jedha. Yaanni hundi isaatuu ilaalcha inni ilma namaatiif qabuu fi taatee inni argamsiisuun hubatama jedhuutti akeeke. Seerri hunduu fedhii ilma namaa eeguudhaafi jechuudhaan eegalee itti [27] fufe. Ejjannoo dhimma al-ta’liil/sababaa irratti qabu ibsuudhaaf jidduu dhimmoota aadaa, taatee guyyaa guyyaa fi jidduu hojii ibaadaa (gabbartii) addaan baase. Seera bulmaataa kanaaf ilaalchi duraa dubbisa qo’annaa seeraa, kan kaayyoon abbaa amantii (qabatama jiru hordofuudhaan) gargaarame. Ilaalchi al-Shaaxibiin dhimma ta’liilaa/sababaa irratti qabu ‘Ta’liilli seera Islaamaa ilaalcha inni dhala namaatiif qabuun ilaalama jechutti amana’ jedhanii cuunfanii kaa’uun ni danda’ama. Al-Shaaxibii fi manni barnoota Maalikii irra hedduun, dhaabbanni bulmaataa kan hojii gabbartii Islaamaatiin wal-qabatan ilala/sababa irraa walaba ta’uu qaba jedhu. Wantoonni sammuun fudhatuu fi kaayyolee gosoota

gabbartii Islaamummaa keessaa hedduun barruu jarri keessatti hundeeffaman deeggara jechuttii amana. Waa’een ibaadaa fi ibsi ibaadaa gara garaa hojii fedhii irratti hundaa’een hin dhihaatu jechuudhaan goolabe. Al-Shaaxibiin akkana jechuudhaan barreesse: “Seerri daldalaa fi aadaadhaan wal-qabatu, akkasumas seerri hedduun kan ibaadaan wal-qabatu, kaayyolee dubbataman, kan faayidaa/fedhii ilma namaa guutuuf karaa godhameedha. Yoo hiika adda addaatiif banaa ta’anii hafan, hiika malee hafuudhaan sababa wal-dhabbii fi qoqqoodamaa ta’u.” Ulaagaaleen akkasii beektonni fiqii murtee tokko sababa irratti hundaa’anii murteessuuf gargaara. Hiikni sirrii, qooduu fi waa addaan baasuun faayidaa beekamaa qaba. Seerri Islaamaa qabiyyee dimshaashaa fi kan adda addaa of keessaa qaba jedhe al-gazaaliin. Fedhiin dimshaashaa seeraan eegame “Seera murtaawaa tokkotti gahuuf nama hundaaf deebii ta’uu qaba…” Akka al-Gazaaliin jedhetti “Seerri hunduu [28] ogummaa (hikmaa)

murtaawaa qaba; gaarummaa fi eebba ilma namaatiif qaba.” Ta’aliilli tooftaa fi seera mataa isaa danda’e, kan heera usuul al-fiqhi keessatti hordofamuun dirqama ta’u qaba. Namni tokkollee yeroo waa’ee seera Rabbii dubbatu ykn hojjatu fedhii fi filannoo isaa irratti hundaa’ee illaa (sababa) kaa’uu hin danda’u. Waahillan nabiyyii wantoota bu’uuraaa fi kaayyolee seera Islaamaati jechuutti hubatan irratti hundaa’uudhaan ta’liila godhaa turan. Beektonni duraanii fi beektonni amantii ta’liila diduudhaan loojikii gaaffii qabu fayyadaman. Al-Shaaxibiin guutummaan guutuutti ta’liila diduu al- Raaziitti hirkise. Garuu ibni Hazmiitu caalaatti morma. Bu’uurri ilaalcha amantii fedhii ilma namaa kan seera Islaamaa keessatti dagaage san eeguudha. Gaaffilee mana murtii kamitu hojii Rabbii fi seera Rabbiin biraa buufameen wal-simata isa jedhu hubachuun barbaachisaadha. Adeemsi bu’uuraa fi faayidaa seeraa adda baasuu tooftaa

addaa, daangeffamaa fi ulaagaa wajjiin kan wal-qabatu ta’uu agarre. Kun hunduu boqonnaawwan kitaaba fiqhii, hadiisaa fi hiika Qur’aanaa fi Sunnaa keessatti ibsamee jira. Nuti faayidaa qabeenyaa fi afuuraa (kan amantii) fi faayidaa bulchiinsa seera Islaamaa keessa jiru barbaaduu, faayidaa argachuu fi miidhaa xiqqeessuutti waamne. Islaamummaan tooftaalee qo’annaa hunda fi beekumsa Rabbiin nuuf kenne fayyadamnee gaaffiiwwan gara waan bu’aa fi seera qabeessaatti jijjiiruutti ajaja. Yeroo dubbiin akkas ta’u goolabbii ragaa qabatamaan wal-simatu irra gahuun isa fudhachuu dandeenya; [29] yoo akkas hin ta’in dhimma sana irratti fedhii Rabbii hordofuu qabna. Beektonni Muslimaa yeroo faayidaa fi miidhaa tilmaaman ykn murteessan miidhaa fi faayidaa kan addunyaa fi aakiraa ilaalcha keessa galchu. Yaad-rimeen faayidaa fi miidhaa beektota Muslimaa biratti faayidaawwan addunyaa biroos of-keessatti qabata. Akkasumas

sababaa fi akkaataa isaan itti argaman, miidhaalee addunyaa biroo, sababaa fi akkaataa miidhaan sun itti aragame; faayidaa addunyaa fi akkaataa faayidaan sun itti argame of keessatti hammata. Fedhiin dhugaan jiru tajaajila malee hin balleessu. Seerri faayidaa garaa garaa argachuu fi itti bashannanuuf daangaa kaa’ee jira. Sababni isaas, tarii ilmi namaa faayidaa wahii kan miidhaawwan gosoota gara garaa qaban, ykn faayidaawwan sana caalu kan silaa fuul-duratti argatu, kan isa dhabsiisu argachuuf yaaluu danda’a. Faayidaa fi miidhaa jidduu wal-faallessuun argamuu danda’a. Sababni isaas wanti tokko gama tokkoon kan faayidaa qabuu fi gama kaaniin immoo kan miidhaa qabu ta’uu waan danda’uufi. Kanaafuu seerri ummanni isaaf ajajamanii fi aangoo isaa jala deeman jiraachuun barbaachisaadha. Kun fedhii walii galaati. Faayidaa fi miidhaa ilaalchisee Islaamummaan gosoota

faayidaa hunda, gulantaa hunda keessatti eeguutti waama. Xiqqaa fi guddaas hin dhiisu. ‘Fedhii murtaawaa tokko daangessuun (zeeroo godhuun) fedhii ilma namaa eeguufi. Kan inni hojiitti hiikamus namoota murtaawaa irrattii fi haala murtaawaa qofa keessatti. Al-Shaaxibiin faayidaawwan gosa gara garaa fi ilaalcha seeraa irra caalaa, kan wal-dhabbii jiru hiikuuf seera Islaamaa keessatti argamu hiikaa fi ibsa isaa kenneefii jira. [30] Seerri Islaamaa wantoota baay’ee barbaachistoota ta’an, wantoota bu’uura jireenyaa ta’anii fi jiruu miidhagsuuf oolan mirkaneessutti waama jechuu irratti beektonni Muslimaa waliif galu. Wantoonni baay’ee barbaachisaa ta’an, kan eegamuu qaban kun: amantii, lubbuu namaa, sammuu, sanyii dhala namaa fi qabeenya. Ammas walii galteen beektotaa kan akkana jedhutu jira: “Wantoonni wantoota shanan kana eeguuf oolu hundi bu’a- qabeessa; wantoonni wantoota shanan kana miidhan

hundi miidha-qabeessa.” Sammuun namaa waan tokko gaarii fi faarfamaadha, ykn badaa fi arrabsamaadha jedhee murteessuu ni danda’amoo wantoonni kun labsii/keeyyata seeraa qofaan murtaa’a kan jedhu gaafii bakka hunda faca’ee jiruudha. Gaafiin akka kanaa kan qo’attoota waa’ee amantii qo’atanii fi warra Usuula fiqhii biratti beekamuun wal-fakkaata. Fakeenyaaf gaaffii al-tahsiin wa al-taqbiih (waan tokko gaariidha ykn badaadha jechuu) fa’a kaasnee ilaaluu ni dandeenya. Al-Shaaxibiin qabxii kana irratti ilaalcha Ash’araa’itiin jijjiirame (ilaalcha isaa fudhate). “Yoo gaaffi idilee tokko irratti ragaan kitaabaa fi ilaalchi sammuu wal-simate ragaa kitaabaatiif dursi kennamuu qaba. Ilaalchi sammuu waan ragaan kitaabaa eeyyamu ta’uu qaba” jedhu jecha Ash’raa’it. Akka Ash’araa’it jedhutti “Sammuun waan tokko gaariidha ykn badaadha, ykn madda faayidaati ykn madda miidhaati” jedhee murteessuu hin danda’u. Gama biraatiin immoo

yaada faallaa Ash’raa’it lamatu jira. Isaanis: yaada Mu’tazilaa fi Maatridiyyaati. Akka yaada Mu’tazilaatti gaarummaa fi badummaan waan tokkoo kan sammuudhaan murteeffamu waan ta’eef gochi tokko osoo seerri [31] isa ibsu hin labsamin dura bu’a qabeessa ykn miidha-qabeessa jedhanii murteessuun ni danda’ama. Warri Mu’tazilaa seera idilee tokko malee, namni sammuu fi ilaalcha sirrii qabu sababa qofaan itti gaafatama fudhata jedhu. Akkuma seera Rabbiin biraa bu’een mirkaneeffamuu danda’u ilaalcha sammuu namaatiinis mirkaneeffamuu danda’a. Garuu kan amma qabatamaan faca’ee jiru tiyoorii Mu’tazilaa osoo hin ta’in kan Ash’raa’iti. Akka yaada kanaatti faayidaa ykn miidhaan waan tokko ykn gocha tokkoof goonu bu’aa seera Rabbiin biraa dhufeeti. Kanneen kitaaba Rabbiin biraa buufame duraatii fi seerri isaan wal-qabatu kan duraan fudhatame yaad-rimee faayidaa fi miidhaa hin qabu.

Qur’aanni wantoonni eeyyamaman bu’a qabeessa; wantoonni dhowwaman miidha qabeessa jechuu nuuf himee jira. Yeroo jalqaba Islaamummaa irraa eegalee Qur’aanni hordoftoota isaatiif dhugummaa dhiheesse; haqa hojjachuutti ajaje; gocha sababa dhugaa (sammuu nagaa) faallessuu fi kijiba ummanni keessa jiraatan ni dheekkame. Ash’araa’it kan “Gaarummaa fi badummaa”n wanta tokkoo akka dhimma sammuun ibsamuutti fudhachuu didan dhimma kana irratti warra Mu’tazilaa wajjiin wal-mormii yeroo dheeraa qabu. Wal-falmiin sababni/ragaan nabi Muhammadii fi ergaa dhugaa kan hin didamnetti geessuu akeeka. Sababa/ragaa dhiheessuun seerri Islaamaa haala sirrii ta’een fedhii ilma namaa eega isa jedhu nama amansiisa. Ilaalchi inni maddifaayidaa ykn miidhaa sammuu ilma namaatiin ibsamuu danda’a jedhu, sammuun ilma namaa waan hunda dogoggora tokko malee sirritti beeka jechuu miti. Sammuun namaa waan garii beekuu danda’a; waan garii

immoo beekuu hin danda’u. [32] Al-Shaaxibiin irra deddeebi’ee akka sammuun namaa qophaa isaa madda bu’aa fi miidhaa murteessuu hin dandeenye ibse. Ummanni karaa malee qajeelfamnaan Rabbiin nabiyyii erge jedhe. Sammuun ilma namaa hanguma fedhe gahumsa qabaatus, amantii waan bu’aa qabu argamsiisuu fi waan miidhaa qabu deebisuuf nama gargaaru qabaachuu barbaachisa. Kanaafuu seera Islaamaa keessatti amantii tiksuun bakka ol’aanaa qaba. Iddoowwan armaan gadii keessatti, sababni fedhii ilma namaa daangessuu keessatti bu’a-qabeessa ta’uu danda’a. Hiikni kitaabaa/wahyii kan fedhii irratti hundaa’e beektota fiqhii irra hedduu biratti akka gaaritti hundeeffamee jira. Fedhii kitaabni Islaamaa mirkaneessuu barbaade mirkaneessuu keessatti sababni shoora guddaa taphata. Fakkeenya waan kanaa kitaabota fiqhii Islaamaa, kitaabban Qur’aanaa fi Sunnaa wabii godhachuudhaan barreeffame hedduu tarreessuun ni danda’ama. Maaltu gaariidha; maaltu badaadha? Isa

jedhu summuudhaan madaaluun jijjiirama madda faayidaa fi miidhaa madaaluu, seera bulmaataa keessatti maal barbaadu kan jedhu madaaluu barbaachisa. Faayidaa fi miidhaan wal-faallessuun dhimma yeroo hedduu wal-dhabbii uumu. Seerri Islaamaa idileen fedhii namaa kan hin daangeffamne uumuu irratti hundaa’e. Daangaan fedhii hin daangeffamnee kun akkuma ummanni Muslimaa heddummaatuun babal’ataa deema. Beektonni seera Islaamaa fedhii hunda bakka isiidhaaf malu, kan seeraa fi kaayyolee isiitiin deeggaramee qubsiisuudhaaf of qopheessuu qabu. Fedhii ummata Muslimaa qixa sirriitiin eeguudhaaf kanatu tooftaa filatamaadha. [33] Qur’aanni waan Afaan Arabaatiin bu’eef kaayyoleen seeraa ol’aanoon Afaan Arabaa irratti hundaa’ee ilaalamuu qaba. Barruun al—Shaaxibii seeraa fi daangaa Afaan Arabaa eeggachuu fi hordofuun kaayyoo kitaaba/ergaa Islaamaa hubachuudhaaf barbaachisaa ta’uu irra deddeebi’ee jabeessa. “Afaan Arabaa kaayyolee ol’aanoo abbaa seeraa ibsa” jedhe. Gocha tokko

irratti seera idilee gara garaa ibsuu ilaalchisee al- Shaaxibiin hariiroo jidduu seerota gara garaa, keessattuu wantoota dirqamaa fi jidduu wantoota hin barbaachisnee fi wantoota dhowwamaa jiru ibsee jira. Al-Shaaxibiin kaayyoleen bu’uuraa wantoota shanan barbaachistoota ta’an wajjiin wal-qixa jedha. Gama biraatiin immoo kaayyolee lammaffaa immoo waan fedhiin namaa itti dabu wajjiin wal-qabsiise. Fedhii namaa immoo sadarkaa wantoota bu’uuraa fi kan miidhaginaaf oolanii keessatti ramade. Akka al-Shaaxibiin jedhutti, qabatama jiru qo’achuun kaayyolee seeraa adda baasuudhaaf meeshaa akkaan barbaachisaadha. Heerri bu’uuraa kan fiqhii Islaamaa dhugaa muramaa irratti hundaa’uu qaba. Ragaan waan kanaa qabatama jiru, kan dhugaa guutuu namaaf ibsu dubbisuudhaan hubatamuu danda’a jedhe. Sababani isaas waan seerri Islaamaa walii galaa ragaa qeenxee osoo hin ta’in ragaa hedduu irratti hundaa’eefi. Al-Shaaxibiin jalqaba kitaaba isaa

al-Muwaffaqaat jedhamuu irratti qabatama jiru qorachuu kaayyolee seeraa wajjiin wal- qabsiise. Kaayyoleen Qur’aanaa fi Sunnaa hundi yaada seera ajaja isaa hordofuu irratti ykn yaada ta’alii (sababa) irratti hirkata. Ta’liilli immoo yaada seerri Islaamaa fedhii ilma namaa eeguudhaafi jedhu, kan irratti waliif galamaa ta’e irratti hirkata. [34] Al-Shaaxibiin yeroo ragaa yaada kana lamaan deeggaru barbaadu Qur’aanaa fi Sunaadhaan eegale. Ragaan al-Shaaxibiin dhiheesse jalqabaa hanga dhumaatti qo’annoo irratti hundaa’e. Qabatama jiru qo’achuun kaayyolee seeraa beekuudhaaf sababa akkaan barbaachisaadha jedhe. Sababni isaas, kaayyoon abbaa seeraa faayidaa fi fedhiiwwan bu’uuraa eeguu waan ta’eefi. Al- Shaaxibiin “Qo’anaa seeraa kan barbaachisummaa walii galaa fi kan daangeffamaa qabu dubbisuudhaan waan kana mirkaneessuun ni danda’ama” jechuudhaan barreesse. Itti fufuudhaan “… dubbisni dhuunfaa/qeenxee … iccitii seeraa fi yaada walii

galaa ilaallata malee ibsa alaa miti” jedhe. Akka al-Shaaxibiin jedhutti, qabatama jiru qoa’achuun kaayyolee seeraa hubachuudhaaf meeshaa akkaan barbaachisaadha. Kaayyoleen karaa qo’annaatiin hubatamu kun seerota Islaamaa gurguddaa fi kan walii galaati. Ibsi al-Shaaxibiis kanuma irra naanna’a. Seera walii galaa fi kayyoolee walii galaa kan al- Shaaxibiin goolabee kaa’e irra gahuuf qo’annoon shoora guddaa taphata. Tiyoorii al-SHaaxibii akka walii galaatti madaaluu Al-Shaaxibiin bu’uura fiqhii Islaamaa, kaayyolee seera Islaamaa qo’achuu fi tiyoorii kaayyolee ijaaruu keessatti shoora guddaa taphate. Obsa, argannoo fi goolabbii qo’annaa irraa argate irraa fayyadame. Qoodaa Usuuliyyootaa kan fedhiiwwan ilma namaa bakka sadiitti qoodan irraas fayyadamee jira. Qoonni sun sadan: wantoota bu’uuraa kan jiruu namaatiif barbaachisan, wantoota barbaachisoo ta’an garuu kan jireenya bu’uuraatiif dirqama hin barbaachisnee fi wantoota jiruu bareechaniidha.

Kunis wantoota [35] eegamuun isaa baay’ee barbaachisaa ta’ankan bakka shanitti qoodaman dabalateeti. Waa’ee fedhii ilma namaa ilaalchisee Al-Shaaxibiin yaada al- Juwaynii, al-Gazaalii fi mana barumsa Maalikiitii, Istislah fi istihsaan, akkasumas barruulee Islaamaa kanneen fedhii irratti hundaa’aniin dhiibbaan irra gahe (yaada isaaniitiin jijjiirame). Manni barmsaa kun kaayyolee abbaa seeraa mirkaneessuu fi isa irratti murtii ofii ijaaruu irratti xiyyeeffata. Al-Shaaxibiin kaayyolee seeraa mul’ataa, qabiyyee beekmaa qabanii fi kannneen hin dagatamne fi hin xiqqeeffatamne irratti xiyyeeffate. Yaanni maqaasid al-Sharii’aa (kaayyolee sharii’aa) barruulee isaa irra hedduu keessa jira. Kaayyoleen seeraa gaaffilee fiqhii sababa irratti hundaa’an keessa akka seensifaman sissi’eesse. Xiyyeeffannoon al-Shaaxibiin kaayyolee ilma namaatiif kenne kan tiyoorii isaa biraa faallessuudha. Kaayyolee seeraatiif xiyyeeffannoo kennuun isaa ibsa kaayyoo ilma namaatiin goolabuu isa dandeessise. Al-SHaaxibiin akkaataan

inni itti ergaa amantii fi kaayyolee namaa wal-qabsisee fi wal-irraa addaan baase, kaayyolee ilma namaa kan inni qormaata abbaa seeraa irratti hundaa’ee adeemsise wal-maddii deemuu dhabuu isaa irratti ibsa kenne. Tooftaan kaayyoon abbaa seeraa ittiin hiikamu ittiin beekamuu damee usuul al-fiqhii biratti damee dabalataati jedhe. Al- Shaaxibiin seera walii galaa, kan kaayyolee ilma namaa, kaayyolee ol’aanoo abbaa seeraa fi tooftaa ittiin kaayyoleen abbaa seeraa beekamu sirritti qulqulleessee lafa kaa’e. Akasumas al-Shaaxibiin hubannoo nuti seera Islaamaa irratti qabnu, kan [36] ijtihaadaa, hooggansa isaa, ga’umsa nuti qajeelfama isaa fudhachuu fi kaayyoo isaa irratti hundoofnee adeemuu irratti qabnu irratti hubannoo keenya jijjiire. Al-Shaaxibiin seera Islaamaa keessatti beekamtummaa argate. Kaayyoo fi faayidaa (hikmaa) isa keessa jiru irratti akeekuudhaan utubaa ta’e. Al-Shaaxibiin gahee fi sadarkaa

1 Ethiopia: Intellectual and Cultural Background INTRODUCTION: ETHIOPIA IN PERSPECTIVE This twenty-ﬁrst-century narrative history of modern Ethiopia traces the ma- jor events of an ancient African civilization in engagement with the global community in which powerful cultural, political, and religious forces helped shaped the evolution of a very signiﬁcant and viable nation state, one primed to face equally signiﬁcant problems associated with the modern era. The modern reader’s conception of Ethiopia has no doubt been shaped by stories of wars and natural disasters including the latter-day famine crisis. In fact, Ethiopia’s history stretches back to antiquity, with references to Ethiopia in the Bible and classical Greek literature. Later, between 1855 and 1974, the state witnessed events that culminated in the

emergence of a centralized modern bureaucratic state. Alongside Haiti and Liberia, Ethiopia maintained her status as one of the three historical independent black nations and, with the exception of a ﬁve-year occupation by Italy under Benito Mussolini, success- fully defended herself against the European colonization of Africa. The mod- ern history of Ethiopia also provides a glimpse of global African cultural, intellectual, and political history. Ethiopia is prominently featured in the ico- nography of both classical and modern era cultural, religious, and political development and therefore is fertile territory for the enthusiast of both ancient and modern Africa. The History of Ethiopia 2 Ethiopia has held a profound cultural signiﬁcance for the black diaspora as one of the world’s—and, to

say the least, Africa’s—oldest independent republics, which provided an (admittedly idealized) inspiration for the dream of black independence throughout the world. Indeed, the name Ethiopia had emerged as a near generic term for the whole universe of dark-skinned people in Western narratives, including Shakespearean literature. Some scholars have argued that the Ethiopian identity was virtually a Western imposition on Af- rican Christians. African slaves in the New World adopted “Ethiopia” as a hallmark of religio-cultural identity because Europeans used it to describe black Africa. Similarly the concept was introduced into the vocabulary of Af- rican peoples on the continent with Portuguese contact in parts of “Ethiopia.” In later centuries, the scriptural prophecy of how Ethiopia would reach to God for

succor was commonly used as a slogan with the European missionary movement to energize efforts for the conversion of Africa. As a result, African Christians could readily appropriate Ethiopia as a symbol of identity and readily embrace Ethiopianism as an intellectual movement of religious na- tionalism and grassroots activism. For these reasons, Ethiopia’s cultural legacy came to embody the concepts of black freedom and independent black na- tionhood and, as we shall see, inﬂuenced generations of prominent black in- tellectuals in the new world. ETHIOPIANISM AND ITS INFLUENCE ON THE AFRICAN DIASPORA Before the twentieth century, some observers have described Ethiopia as “the Hidden Empire” because of its relative isolation and feudal autocracy. Others have mythicized the Ethiopian state as

the epitome of African inde- pendence and self-determination as a result of having defeated an invading Italian force in 1896 at Adwa. Noted intellectual and activist W.E.B. DuBois expressed this anticolonial sentiment in 1935 when he stated that “unlike other parts of colonized Africa, Ethiopia . . . had kept comparatively free of debt, had preserved her political autonomy, had begun to reorganize her an- cient policy, and was in many ways an example and a promise of what a native people untouched by modern exploitation and race prejudice might do.”1 DuBois’ evocation was not only a reﬂection of the ancient state’s his- torical background and Africa’s transition into modernity, it was also a reﬂec- tion of Ethiopianism, which had

emerged as an Afro-Atlantic literary-religious tradition common to the English-speaking world originating out of shared political and religious experiences of the late eighteenth and early nineteenth centuries. Ethiopianism had also found expression in the slave narratives, in the exhortations of conspiratorial slave preachers, and in the songs and folk- lore of the slaves of the Old and the peasants of the New South. As a literary Ethiopia 3 tradition it later became part of the sermons and political tracts of a sophis- ticated urban elite. Practitioners of Ethiopianism found inspiration in the bib- lical passage, “Princes shall come of Egypt; Ethiopia shall soon stretch out her hands unto God” (Psalms 68:31). The verse was seen by those who associated modernity

with Western traditions as a prophecy that Africa would through Christianity “soon” be saved from “heathenism” and was a prerequisite for a dramatic political, industrial, and economic renaissance. For cultural na- tionalists however, the scripture is a prophecy that some day the black man would rule the world. “Ethiopian” traditions often lay claim to African genius, aspirations which, they argued, were undermined by the cultural dependency borne out of slavery and colonialism. This tragic racial experience, they con- cluded, carried a profound historical value that endowed the African with presumed moral superiority. In addition, the rise of modern black internationalism—a combination of intellectual and political protests and lobbying—arose out of the global pow- ers’ ambivalence to the plight of Africa

in the face of Italian transgression of what was considered the black man’s last citadel. Ethiopia thus became the trigger for a modern black political tradition, which combined political activ- ism with trade unionism and anticolonialism with early civil rights initiatives. Ethiopia’s regional signiﬁcance in the northeast region of Africa known as the “Horn,” so called because of the horn-shaped tip of the continent that marks off the Red Sea from the Indian Ocean, also provides a window into the twentieth-century economic, political, and cultural evolution of modern Af- rican societies. Ethiopia is bounded by Sudan in the west, Djibouti in the east, Eritrea in the north and northeast, Somalia in the southeast and Kenya to the south. Ethiopia’s population

is estimated at more than 76 million, making it the third most populous African country after Nigeria and Egypt. Its modern ethnic composition includes a number of groups: the Oromo 40 at percent; Amhara and Tigre at 32 percent; Sidamo 9 at percent; Shankella 6 at percent; Somali 6 at percent; Afar 4 at percent; Gurage at 2 percent; and 1 percent other. Two important phenomena helped deﬁne the setting for the unfolding history of the modern Ethiopia. The state went through a series of changes, from its status as a powerful state in ancient and medieval times to social and political decline in the middle of the eighteenth century. Domestically, Ethiopia suffered rapid political fragmentation fueled by the usurpation

of civil and political powers and zero-sum conﬂicts between monarchs and emergent feudal lords. Ethiopia’s centralized government was replaced by a decentralized provincial autonomy of rulers, many of whom had social, po- litical, and economic relations but also often warred among themselves. From the late nineteenth into the twentieth century Ethiopia’s modern external re- lations were unique yet symbolic of modern Africa’s political and economic history as the continent was subsumed by shifting global power conﬁgura- tions. The importance of the Red Sea in global affairs was increasing, given The History of Ethiopia 4 its triadic signiﬁcance of cultural, political, and economic activities. From the late nineteenth century to the latter half of the twentieth, the impact of Western colonial

and Cold War ideologies also had considerable ramiﬁcations upon territorial conﬁgurations and social, political, military, and economic affairs in the northeast region of Africa. Following the overthrow of colonialism throughout the continent, African nationalists expressed the aspirations of their people for an economic, political, and cultural renaissance by creating a movement of independent states called the Organization of African Unity. The ﬁrst conference was held at its new headquarters in Addis Ababa, the capital of modern Ethiopia, in 1963. Other relevant themes in the history of modern Ethiopia include modernization reforms in the educational, military, and po- litical realms and constitutional sectors. The sum of these concepts is emblem- atic of African transition into the modern era. Regrettably, Ethiopia’s simultaneous

development of independence with cultural and intellectual ad- vancement was not accompanied by corollary economic development or a considerable rise in the status of the peasantry class, a theme that we shall explore in greater detail over the course of this book. We shall also analyze efforts directed toward the management of natural disasters by the creation of state bureaucracies and the development of non- state actors in Ethiopia as she deals with natural disasters, political irreden- tism, and economic development. We will also deal with what some have described as an Ethiopian renaissance fueled by a political intelligentsia and popular culture shaped by traditional Ethiopian communities and their emer- gent Diasporic returnees. The literary renaissance of ancient Ethiopian scripts,

such as the thousand-year-old Kebra Negast described by some as the lost Bible of Rastafarian wisdom, and the popular yearning for similar ancient manu- scripts locked away in European museums not only served as a testament to the common experience of colonialism but also as evidence of the refashioning of ancient tools for the modern nation-building process. This becomes more signiﬁcant with the latter-day regeneration of the Ethiopian state in political and cultural terms, and also in the sheer population size of the state as a modern entity. GEOGRAPHY, CULTURE, AND POLITICAL BACKGROUND Ethiopia, described by ancient chroniclers as a land of awe-inspiring moun- tains, isolated plateaus, and precipitous valleys, owes its name to the Greeks, who referred mainly to

the black population living south of Egypt. Ethiopia’s geography, like its people, has a long and dynamic history, resulting in a scenic landscape of variety and splendor unique to the whole of Africa. The high- lands of present-day Ethiopia are dissected by enormous gorges and canyons Ethiopia 5 thousands of feet deep, the largest and most spectacular of which is the valley of the Abbai. Except where piles of volcanic lava formed great mountain ranges, the intervening areas were left as ﬂat-topped plateaus, called ambas by the Ethiopians. Many of these plateaus remain completely isolated from one another, some being joined only by the narrowest necks of land between great precipices. The fragmented nature of Ethiopia highlands played an important

part in the country’s political and cultural history. Isolated and mountainous plateau massifs have proven to be almost insurmountable obstacles to political leaders who have sought to unify the country, to the invaders who desired to conquer it, and to those who have sporadically attempted to develop its economic resources. Ethiopia is divided topographically into three major zones: daga (the cool highlands where the annual average temperature is about 16 degrees centigrade), wayna daga (the intermediate zone where most of the settled population lives), and qolla (the hot valleys and plains, which are dependent on the desert conditions of the northeastern end of the Rift Valley for their hotness or coolness). The climatic designations have over time assumed broader signiﬁcance

for their impact on the distinctive ways of life, culture, means of existence, and social temperaments. Ethiopia contains four major rivers systems. The ﬁrst system consists of the Takkaze (also known as the Atbara), the Abbay (Blue Nile), and the Baro (Sobat), originating in Sudan and ﬂowing westward into the Nile. The Abbay is the most famous, deriving its source from Lake Tana. In the second group is the Ganale, which is also known as Juba, and the Wabe Shabale, and these two rivers both ﬂow towards the Indian Ocean. The Gibe, also known as Omo in its lower course, ﬂows through the southwestern highlands, with the Tur- kana, also known as Lake Rudolph, on the Ethio-Kenya border as its

terminus. The Awash sets off from the highlands west of Addis Ababa, Ethiopia’s cap- ital, streams across the Rift Valley, and vanishes in its northeastern sands. The Rift also play host to Ethiopian major chain of lakes. These include Lakes Zway, Langano Abyata, Shala, and Awasa in the north, Abbaya and Chamo in the middle, and Lake Rudolf at the southern tip. A string of volcanic crater lakes can be found around the town of Dabra Zayt, formerly known as Be- shoftu, about 31 miles south of Addis Ababa. The main growing season in Ethiopia is known as keramt for the “heavy rains” that fall between June and September. The balg or “little rains” occur between March and May. These

are caused by monsoon winds blowing from the Indian Ocean into the low-pressure area of the Sahara desert and Arabia. The temperate conditions of the northern and central highlands have permit- ted abundant agricultural productivity. The most important of this is tef (Er- agrostis tef) a small cereal indigenous and peculiar to the country that is processed into the distinctive bread, enjara, the staple diet of a large proportion The History of Ethiopia 6 of the country’s population. In the southern part, ensat, a root vegetable, is the staple crop. Geographic isolation also created a spirit of relative independence in many areas where the pattern of life has remained unchanged for hundreds of years, and where the central government still

has only limited inﬂuence. The no- mads of the Danakil deserts; the farmers of the cool mountains of Shewa, Gojjam, and Tigre; the ﬁshermen of the coast of Eritrea; the collectors in the coffee forests of Jimma; and the hunters in the wet tropical forests farther southwest are as varied in their customs and livelihood as the scenery itself. Nowhere are the human and scenic contrasts more marked than along the edges of the vast Rift Valley escarpments. To the northeast, the Rift Valley broad- ens like a funnel to join the Red Sea, and part of this region, the Danakil De- pression, lies below sea level. The Danakil, or Afar Desert, separates Ethiopia from similar deserts and mountain terrain

in Arabia, but, as we shall see, this did not preclude early cultural contacts with the Islamic world. Ethiopia’s contribution to the development of world religions is also evident in the evolution of early Christian traditions. In the fourth century, the Chris- tian Church, inﬂuenced by the great Middle-Eastern academies, developed two separate schools of thought on the nature of Christ. The Greek and Roman churches held that a divine and a human spirit had been brought together and fused in the body of Christ. Alternatively, many of the representatives of the Syrian and Egyptian churches believed in the singular, divine nature of Christ. Their attitude came to be described as Monophysite, Jacobean, or Cop- tic. Ancient Ethiopia had followed

the lead of Alexandrian Egyptian, and to this day remains Coptic. The church emphasizes that all concerning Christ should be applied to his entire person as one Lord. The seven sacraments (mysteries)—baptism, conﬁrmation, penance, Holy Communion, unction of the sick, matrimony, and holy orders—are important in the teaching of the Ethiopian Orthodox Church. Sacraments are holy ordinance through which the believer receives an invisible grace under the form of an outward sign. In the performance of each sacrament the Divine Majesty himself is present. The church also teaches ﬁve other pillars of mysteries: the mystery of the Trinity, incarnation, baptism, Eucharist, and the resurrection of the dead. These mys- teries are regarded by the church as basic knowledge for all
